title: Summary: Turn 856
content: Knowledge Base optimization roadmap reviewed: 8 directions prioritized (1. query performance, 2. CRUD completeness, 3. search/export, 4. LLM caching, 5. logging/error handling, 6. config validation, 7. version control, 8. UI). Short-term 1-week plan: query caching, CRUD, search/export, logging. Success metrics: duplicate check <5ms, load <1s, cache hit >60%, error recovery >90%, coverage >85%.
